pp-model-raw.raw-yaml:
type: object
required:
    - conditions
properties:
    conditions:
        type: array
        items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/DetectedCondition'
    skin_type:
        type: string
        enum:
            - oily
            - dry
            - combination
            - normal
            - sensitive
    fitzpatrick_type:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 6
    price_tier:
        type: string
        enum:
            - '$'
            - '$$'
            - '$$$'
            - '$$$$'

model.name: RecommendationRequest
model.rawYaml:
type: object
required:
    - conditions
properties:
    conditions:
        type: array
        items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/DetectedCondition'
    skin_type:
        type: string
        enum:
            - oily
            - dry
            - combination
            - normal
            - sensitive
    fitzpatrick_type:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 6
    price_tier:
        type: string
        enum:
            - '$'
            - '$$'
            - '$$$'
            - '$$$$'
